general_changes: Global Changes
Facets removed from the game
Innate abilities no longer scale with other abilities' level
All innate abilities that used to scale with other abilities now either provide unchangeable bonuses or improve on 'per level' basis
Abilities that improve with hero level have base value and increment value. Some also have amount of levels required for increment
Abilities that improve each level provide their increment value at level 1
Added UI icon that shows you which parameters increase with hero level and what is the current value
Pressing ALT key will show base value and increment of the ability
Some non-innate ability might have this per level UI as well
Abilities that had 'per level up' scaling changed to be 'per level'
This mostly affects heroes reworked in update 7.40 and Largo
Flagbearer Creep Experience Bounty increased from 57 to 60
First +1 siege creep timing decreased from 35:00 to 30:00
Second +1 siege creep timing now occurs at 60:00
Adjusted the meeting point of the lane creeps toward the offlane
Now offlane creeps are slightly slowed upon leaving the base for a couple of seconds
Safe lane creeps are slightly accelerated upon leaving the base for a couple of seconds
Both of these changes are effective until the 7:30 mark
All sections of currents now give a max movement speed bonus of 150
Previously was only provided by sections on the base and near it, while other sections provided max bonus of 100
Map Objectives
Tormentor
Tormentor's spawn preference has switched
Now begins in the Bottom Chasm
Unyielding Shield Base barrier increased from 2000 to 3000
Unyielding Shield Barrier upgrade per minute increased from 20 to 50
Unyielding Shield Base barrier regen decreased from 40 to 20
Unyielding Shield Barrier regen upgrade per minute increased from 3.5 to 5
Reflect Base damage reflection percentage decreased from 50% to 30%
Reflect radius can now be seen by holding ALT key
The Shining base damage decreased from 60 to 20
The Shining damage now increases by 2 per minute
Now has 25% Status Resistance
No longer deals damage to neutral units
Player that got Aghanim's Shard will no longer receive 175 gold
Total team gold reward decreased from 875 to 700 (total networth change decreased from 2275 to 2100).
Reward if all players have Aghanim's Shard decreased from 455 gold to 415 gold
Roshan's pit preference has switched
Now begins in the Top Pit
Wisdom Shrines and Lotus Pools now reverse their countdowns if heroes from opposing teams enter the area, instead of pausing the countdown
Wisdom Shrine Experience changed from 280 per interval to 200 base and 300 per subsequent shrine (200/500/800 etc)
Terrain Changes
Tormentor spawns have been positioned closer towards Lotus Pools
Tormentor spawn areas have been reduced to low ground relative to the lane's level
Lotus Pools have been moved slightly closer to their respective offlane tower
Twin Gates slightly moved away from the stairs towards the map border
The watcher between the safe lane tier 1 tower and the tormentor has been repositioned
Result:
Tormentor is on the low ground which has three stairs: one leading to the Lotus Pool, one leading to the lane, and one leading to even higher ground area with the Twin Gate

Twin Gate highground area is now smaller and has three stairs: one that leads to new Tormentor area, one that leads back to the lane, and one that goes two levels down straight to the end of the stream
